scripts.build: pnpm run icons && pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:backend
scripts.dist: pnpm run prepare-dist && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config build/electron-builder.generated.yml
scripts.dist:win: pnpm run prepare-dist && pnpm run build && electron-builder --win --config build/electron-builder.generated.yml
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm run prepare-dist && pnpm run build && electron-builder --linux --config build/electron-builder.generated.yml
